name: CHS Golf
about: CHS Golf is an indoor golf and entertainment venue located in Charleston, SC. It features bays equipped with Trackman technology for golf simulation and offers a full whiskey bar with upscale drinks. The venue is designed for both golf practice and social gatherings, with amenities like shuffleboard, foosball, pool, and darts available. They cater to individual players, groups, and private parties, with a modern, relaxed atmosphere combining sports and leisure.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Full bar and food menu available on-site
Multiple game options beyond golf (shuffleboard, pool, darts)
Private party and group event capabilities
Flexible pricing for both members and non-members

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu available on-site, including items like wings and Italian sandwiches
Full bar with upscale whiskeys, bourbons, and other beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade launch monitor with dual radar technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own clubs for use in the simulator bays.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as CHS Golf has a full kitchen and bar available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: An 18-hole round typically takes 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: CHS Golf is primarily an adults-focused venue with a bar atmosphere, making it more suitable for ages 21+.
